mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM sys_dict_data d INNER JOIN sys_dict_type t ON d.dict_type_id = t.id WHERE t.dict_code = #{dictCode} AND d.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY d.sort
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type_id = #{dictTypeId} ORDER BY sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_data (dict_type_id, dict_label, dict_value, sort, status) VALUES (#{dictTypeId}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{sort}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
